title: Active Lane Bot Party Dock
summary: Added a compact bot party dock inside every mounted lane stage, surfacing lane owner/support avatars, callsigns, command status, and next-action snippets.
proof: Rendered owner/support bot party records from existing lane agents, command status, and next-action state.
Kept callsigns, avatars, status, and actions visible inside the selected lane cockpit without adding a separate roster section.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the unlock.
